scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @pi-gui/session-driver build && pnpm --filter @pi-gui/catalogs build && pnpm --filter @pi-gui/pi-sdk-driver build
scripts.dev:electron:watch: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --watch
scripts.dev:electron:start: wait-on dist-electron/main.js dist-electron/preload.js http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:renderer && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --out-dir dist-electron --external electron
scripts.test: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background playwright test tests/smoke.spec.ts tests/worktrees-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:core: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core
scripts.test:e2e:native: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm exec playwright test tests/native
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live
scripts.test:live:parallel: cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/parallel-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:controls: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/controls-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:skills-settings: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/skills-settings-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:worktrees: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/worktrees-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:persistence: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/persistence-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:workspace-menu: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/workspace-menu-live.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:notifications: pnpm build && pnpm exec playwright test tests/notifications-live.spec.ts
